metadata.title: Starter App — Project Template
metadata.description: Project template with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, Drizzle ORM, Better Auth and more.

hero.description: Full-stack template with auth, database, i18n, emails, theming and more. Production-ready.

auth.title: Complete authentication
auth.desc: Login, registration, OAuth, magic links, 2FA, roles and sessions with Better Auth.

database.title: Database
database.desc: Serverless PostgreSQL with Neon and Drizzle ORM. Migrations, typed schemas.

i18n.title: Multi-language
i18n.desc: Support for ES, EN and CA with next-intl. Localized routes and typed translations.

email.title: Transactional emails
email.desc: React Email templates with Resend. Verification, password reset, magic links.

theme.title: Dark/Light mode
theme.desc: Dark and light theme with next-themes. Respects system preference.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Security headers, CSP, rate limiting, audit logs and Zod validation.

stack.title: Modern stack
stack.subtitle: The best tools in the ecosystem.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter your credentials to access your account
login.verifiedMessage: Email verified. Sign in to continue.
login.resetMessage: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
login.emailNotVerifiedMessage: Your email is not verified. We resent the verification link. Check your inbox.
login.accountLocked: Account temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts.

magicLink.title: Sign in without password
magicLink.description: We'll send you a magic link to your email
magicLink.successDesc: We sent you a link to access your account. Check your inbox.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Fill out the form to create your account
register.checkEmailDesc: We sent you a verification link. Check your inbox (and spam folder) to activate your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.metaDescription: Request a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.checkEmailDesc: If an account with that email exists, you'll receive a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.metaDescription: Set a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDesc: The password reset link is no longer valid. Request a new one.

verifyEmail.metaDescription: Verify your email address to activate your account.
verifyEmail.invalidLinkDesc: The verification link is no longer valid. Sign in to request a new one.
verifyEmail.verifiedDesc: Your account has been activated successfully. Redirecting to sign in...

twoFactor.title: 2FA Verification
twoFactor.description: Enter the code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.metaDescription: Verify your identity with two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.codeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

authLayout.platformDesc: Full-stack template with auth, database, i18n and more.

addresses.title: My Addresses
addresses.subtitle: Manage your addresses.
addresses.empty: You don't have any saved addresses.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernamePattern: Only letters, numbers, dots and underscores

errors.notFound: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. We're working on fixing it.

twoFactorSettings.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactorSettings.disabledDesc: Add an extra layer of security
twoFactorSettings.enableDesc: Enter your password to generate the QR code
twoFactorSettings.scanDesc: Scan this code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
twoFactorSettings.backupWarning: Save these codes in a safe place. You will need them if you lose access to your authenticator app.

activeSessions.title: Active sessions
activeSessions.sessionCount: {count, plural, one {# active session} other {# active sessions}}

common.fallbackLink: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link in your browser:

magicLink.subject: Your access link
magicLink.heading: Access your account
magicLink.subheading: Click the link to sign in
magicLink.paragraph: We received a request to access your account. Click the button below to sign in securely without a password:
magicLink.infoBox: This link expires in 10 minutes and can only be used once. If you did not request this access, you can ignore this email.

verification.subject: Verify your email
verification.preview: Verify your email to activate your account
verification.heading: Verify your email
verification.subheading: Just one more step to activate your account
verification.paragraph: Thanks for joining. To activate your account, verify your email address:
verification.infoBox: This link expires in 1 hour. If you did not create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

resetPassword.subject: Reset your password
resetPassword.heading: Reset password
resetPassword.subheading: We received your request to change your password
resetPassword.paragraph: Someone requested to reset the password for your account. If it was you, click the button below to create a new password:
resetPassword.warningBox: This link expires in 1 hour. If you did not request this change, ignore this email. Your current password will not be changed.
resetPassword.tipStrong: Use a password of at least 8 characters with letters, numbers, and symbols.
resetPassword.tipUnique: Do not reuse passwords from other services.
resetPassword.tipTwoFactor: Enable two-factor verification for greater protection.
